_comment: Canonical AWS intent names for Cloud Operator IAM policy management. Shared across g8ee (Python), VSOD (JavaScript). Must stay in sync with CloudFormation managed policies (ami/cloudformation/cloud-operator.yaml Intent-* resources).

ec2_discovery.question: Should I be able to see other EC2 instances in your account?

ec2_management.question: Should I be able to start, stop, and manage EC2 instances?

ec2_snapshot_management.question: Should I be able to create and manage EC2/EBS snapshots and AMIs?

s3_read.question: Should I be able to read files from S3 buckets?

s3_write.question: Should I be able to write files to S3 buckets?

s3_bucket_discovery.question: Should I be able to list and view S3 bucket configurations?

s3_delete.question: Should I be able to delete objects from S3 buckets?

terraform_state.question: Should I be able to manage Terraform state in S3 and DynamoDB?

cloudformation_deployment.question: Should I be able to create and update CloudFormation stacks?

cloudwatch_logs.question: Should I be able to view and write CloudWatch Logs?

secrets_read.question: Should I be able to read secrets from Secrets Manager?

lambda_discovery.question: Should I be able to see Lambda functions?

lambda_invoke.question: Should I be able to invoke Lambda functions?

rds_discovery.question: Should I be able to see RDS databases?

rds_management.question: Should I be able to start, stop, and reboot RDS databases?

rds_snapshot_management.question: Should I be able to create and manage RDS snapshots?

aurora_cluster_management.question: Should I be able to manage Aurora clusters (failover, modify, add/remove instances)?

aurora_scaling.question: Should I be able to manage Aurora Serverless v2 scaling and capacity?

aurora_cloning.question: Should I be able to clone Aurora clusters?

aurora_global_database.question: Should I be able to manage Aurora Global Database operations?

ecs_discovery.question: Should I be able to see ECS clusters and services?

ecs_management.question: Should I be able to update and manage ECS services?

eks_discovery.question: Should I be able to see EKS clusters?

vpc_discovery.question: Should I be able to see VPCs, subnets, and security groups?

elb_discovery.question: Should I be able to see load balancers?

route53_discovery.question: Should I be able to see Route 53 hosted zones and DNS records?

route53_management.question: Should I be able to create and modify Route 53 DNS records?

autoscaling_discovery.question: Should I be able to see Auto Scaling groups?

autoscaling_management.question: Should I be able to adjust Auto Scaling group capacity?

cloudwatch_metrics.question: Should I be able to read CloudWatch metrics?

sns_discovery.question: Should I be able to see SNS topics?

sns_publish.question: Should I be able to publish messages to SNS topics?

sqs_discovery.question: Should I be able to see SQS queues?

sqs_management.question: Should I be able to send and manage messages in SQS queues?

eventbridge_discovery.question: Should I be able to see EventBridge rules and event buses?

dynamodb_discovery.question: Should I be able to see DynamoDB tables?

dynamodb_read.question: Should I be able to read items from DynamoDB tables?

dynamodb_write.question: Should I be able to write items to DynamoDB tables?

elasticache_discovery.question: Should I be able to see ElastiCache clusters?

kms_discovery.question: Should I be able to see KMS keys?

kms_crypto.question: Should I be able to encrypt and decrypt data using KMS keys?

iam_discovery.question: Should I be able to see IAM roles and policies?

acm_discovery.question: Should I be able to see ACM certificates?

apigateway_discovery.question: Should I be able to see API Gateway APIs?

stepfunctions_discovery.question: Should I be able to see Step Functions state machines?

stepfunctions_execution.question: Should I be able to start and stop Step Functions executions?

athena_discovery.question: Should I be able to see Athena workgroups and queries?

athena_query_execution.question: Should I be able to execute Athena queries?

glue_discovery.question: Should I be able to see Glue databases and crawlers?

cloudfront_discovery.question: Should I be able to see CloudFront distributions?

codedeploy_discovery.question: Should I be able to see CodeDeploy applications and deployments?

cost_explorer.question: Should I be able to read AWS cost and usage data?
